conflict: Mutual suspicion and trauma histories make both operational and emotional trust unstable.
consequence: Sexual intimacy and confession produce attachment while also creating new leverage vulnerabilities.
must_land_beats: Ina discloses part of her intelligence arrangement to Minjae.
Minjae reveals his sister's dependence on smuggling routes into Pyongyang.
They have sex in a context of fear, desire, and exhausted honesty.
Minjae gives Ina a limited route key, tying strategy to intimacy.
objective: Build enough trust with Minjae to reconfigure safer distribution channels.
